layouts.hint: Choose a layout for your CV.
layouts.classicDescription: Two-column with dark sidebar. European style.
layouts.usSingleDescription: Single-column and ATS-optimized. Great for recruiter workflows.

cvLanguage.label: CV language
cvLanguage.confirmMessage: This will reset section titles to {{language}} defaults. Continue?

resetModal.title: Reset
resetModal.subtitle: Choose what you want to reset. This cannot be undone.
resetModal.layoutStylingDescription: Restore colors, fonts, sizes, element order and visibility to defaults. Your CV content is kept.
resetModal.cvDataDescription: Replace all CV content (name, experience, education...) with placeholder data. Layout settings are kept.
resetModal.everythingDescription: Full reset — both layout and CV content are restored to their original defaults.

editor.metaTitle: CV Editor — Build and customise your CV online
editor.metaDescription: Create, edit and export your CV online with flexible layouts, custom styling and PDF export.

landing.metaTitle: Free CV Builder Online — Create a professional CV with MyCeeVee
landing.metaDescription: Create a professional CV online for free with ATS-friendly structure. Choose a layout, adjust colours and fonts, edit sections comfortably and export your CV to PDF without creating an account.
landing.eyebrow: Can creating a CV be even simpler?
landing.heroTitle: Create your CV without needing to sign up.
landing.heroLead: MyCeeVee helps you prepare a modern and readable CV in a few minutes. You can choose an ATS-friendly single-column layout, edit your summary, experience, skills, languages and certifications directly in the preview, then fine-tune the document for print or PDF export.

trust.fast: Fast to start, easy to finish
trust.noAccount: No account required for the free version

sections.whyTitle: A free CV builder designed to help you get the job done quickly.
sections.whyLead: This app was created for people who need to build a CV online quickly without fighting bloated forms and heavy graphic tools. The goal is simple: help you create a clear document in a low-stress way.
sections.howTitle: From blank page to downloadable CV in three comfortable steps.
sections.howLead: The flow is intentionally lightweight, so you can focus on your story instead of on technical friction.
sections.seoTitle: A free resume builder for people who value clarity, speed and privacy.
sections.atsTitle: Create a CV that stays readable for recruiters and applicant tracking systems.
sections.atsLead: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) software often scans a CV before a recruiter reads it. The single-column resume layout keeps the content in a clear order with standard headings such as Summary, Experience, Skills, Education, Languages and Certifications.

features.speedText: Open the app, choose a layout and start editing right away. You can prepare a strong CV quickly, without registration, wasted time or unnecessary settings. Print or PDF? That part is up to you.
features.flexibleText: You get two simple templates. Why more? A CV should be readable, clear and focused. Edit your summary, experience, skills, languages and certifications, reorder sections, add your own sections, and adjust spacing, colours and fonts.
features.multilingualText: English is the default language, but the interface and landing page can work in many languages, which makes the tool a better fit for different markets.

steps.step1Title: Choose a layout and start editing
steps.step1Text: Begin with a clean CV template, then edit contact details, summary, experience, education, skills, languages, certifications and custom sections directly in the preview.
steps.step2Title: Adjust the document to your style
steps.step2Text: Tune colours, fonts, spacing and section order so the document feels consistent, readable and aligned with the type of role you want.
steps.step3Text: Use the built-in export flow to prepare your CV for printing or PDF download once the content and visual details feel complete.

seo.lead: If you are looking for a free CV builder, an online resume tool or a simple CV generator, MyCeeVee was designed exactly for that purpose.
seo.paragraph1: The app lets you create a professional CV online without complicated desktop software and without creating an account. In one place you can edit your summary, experience, education, skills, languages, certifications and custom sections, while seeing the result immediately in a print-ready A4 layout.
seo.paragraph2: Unlike many generic form-based editors, this CV builder gives you a few concrete ways to edit. You can choose between two core layouts, including an ATS-optimized single-column resume, change fonts and colours, manage section visibility and tailor the document to a specific application. That makes the tool useful both as an online resume builder and as a practical CV creator for European and international markets.
seo.paragraph3: Because the free version works directly in the browser and does not require login for normal use, it is a very good option for people who want to make a CV quickly, improve an existing resume or generate a polished PDF before sending an application.

faq.answer1: Yes. The free version is meant to be fully useful on its own and does not require an account for normal editing.
faq.question2: Can I prepare a CV as a PDF?
faq.answer2: Yes. The editor is built around print-ready CV output, and export is being developed to support both printing and direct PDF download.
faq.answer3: Yes. The US Resume layout keeps the structure simple, uses standard section headings and avoids multi-column blocks, which makes it a better fit for ATS parsing than more decorative layouts.
faq.question4: Can I use the app in different languages?
faq.answer4: Yes. English is the default language, and the interface already supports many languages. The landing page is also prepared for multilingual use.
faq.question5: Do I need to sign up to use the app?
faq.answer5: No. You can use the free version of the app without registering or logging in.

final.title: Start building your CV now and tailor it to the job you want to get.
final.text: Open the editor, try the layouts, refine the style and prepare a CV that already looks professional before a recruiter reads the first sentence.

landing.twitterDescription: Create a CV online for free in minutes with an ATS-friendly single-column option. Adjust colours and fonts, edit sections and export your CV to PDF without creating an account.
landing.structuredDescription: Create a CV online for free in minutes with an ATS-friendly single-column option. Adjust colours and fonts, edit sections and export your CV to PDF without creating an account.

ats.item1Text: Use headings ATS tools and recruiters recognize, so your experience and skills are easier to classify.
ats.item2Text: The ATS-focused resume layout keeps content in one natural flow without decorative sidebars, charts or split columns.
ats.item3Text: Skills and languages stay as plain text entries, while summary, experience, education and certifications remain easy to edit and export.
